items.creator: @ionet_official
items.title:
RT by @Carita73433942: Building the world's largest AI compute DePIN means http://io.net has tens of thousands of independent node operators around the world.

Providing alternatives to centralized cloud providers is more than bringing transactions for compute on-chain, it is tapping into the distributed compute that already exists in the world and making it available to innovators and builders advancing AI and ML.

video from our community member @leeland_sol
